summary: Full backend + frontend verification of PalmMitra monetization overhaul (subscription-first pricing, wallet system, dynamic per-question pricing, free/confirm/paid chat lifecycle, admin config). 6/6 pytest backend tests passed. All 4 frontend flows (Landing pricing, Chat wallet/confirm modal, Report continue-journey banner, Admin pricing editor) verified via Playwright. No blocking issues.
backend_passed: GET /api/config returns monthly=399, yearly=3499, report=299, palmmatch=1999, free_question_limit=2, member_daily_cap=5, 4 tiers, 4 wallet_packs
GET /api/wallet (auth) returns balance_inr, free_remaining, member=false, wallet_packs(4), question_tiers(4), transactions

Chat lifecycle: 2 free messages -> billing_mode='free' charged_inr=0 with valid reply; 3rd w/o confirm -> HTTP 402 detail.error='confirmation_required' with estimate; 3rd w/ confirm=true -> billing_mode='paid', charged_inr=40, balance 80->40
GET/PUT /api/admin/config: PUT free_question_limit=3 persists, reflected on GET /api/config; restored to 2
frontend_passed: Landing #pricing shows data-testid=pricing-report (₹299) and dominant pricing-membership card
membership-cta ('Become a Member') present and clickable
/chat/rpt_efc49a2be09c: wallet-pill visible showing ₹40 (was ₹80 pre-test; reduced by ₹40 during lifecycle test)
Chat send -> chat-modal appears with tier label, cost ₹5, 'Balance after ₹35', confirm-pay-btn present (Escape used to avoid extra spend)
/admin -> admin-tab-pricing opens admin-pricing editor with 19 number inputs; save-config-btn present. Values reflect config (399/3499/299/1999/2/5, tiers 5/10/20/40, wallet packs)

issues: data-testid='free-questions-pill' is not rendered when free_remaining=0 (conditional). Review request expected it to show '2 free left' — verified visually pre-consumption via confirm-modal logic. Consider always rendering with '0 free left' state OR this is intentional.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1416 lines (>700 threshold) — recommend splitting into modules (auth, palm, payment, chat, admin, blog).
get_current_user is invoked twice inside track_event via wrapping try/except; acceptable but consider optional-user helper.
In send_chat, when member is over daily cap the HTTPException detail is a dict — FastAPI serializes fine but tests must read detail as dict (works). No fix needed.

_estimate_question keyword list contains generic tokens like 'start' and 'family' — may over-classify to higher tier for short casual messages containing those words. Consider refining tokens or requiring word boundaries.
Referral credit path counts prior_paid AFTER marking current order paid; the 'prior_paid <= 1' guard is correct but subtle — add a comment for future maintainers.
seed_data_creation: None. Config free_question_limit was toggled 2->3 and restored to 2. Demo user state was consumed during lifecycle test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: IMPORTANT STATE AFTER THIS RUN: demo user free_questions_used=2 (i.e. 0 free remaining) and wallet_balance_inr=40 (was 80; ₹40 spent on paid complex-tier chat during lifecycle test). Also chat_messages now has 6 additional records for rpt_efc49a2be09c (2 free user + 2 assistant + 1 paid user + 1 assistant). To re-run test_chat_pricing_lifecycle, the demo user needs to be reset (main agent has that reset mechanism per problem statement). All other backend tests are idempotent. Frontend free-questions-pill will not appear until free_remaining>0 — this appears to be conditional rendering in Chat.jsx (not a bug, but worth confirming design intent).
